center.name: 譚衛道
center.summary: 譚衛道是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括金胸歌鸲，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The firethroat (Calliope pectardens) also known as David's rubythroat or Père David's orangethroat is a species of passerine bird in the family Muscicapidae, found in western and central parts of China

links.evidence: The firethroat (Calliope pectardens) also known as David's rubythroat or Père David's orangethroat is a species of passerine bird in the family Muscicapidae, found in western and central parts of China
